zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum於1449年出生在英國貝德福爾帕文哈姆時，她的父親Raufe Radus de Hyde46歲，母親Margareta Dukinfield45歲。她和Bruce Baker至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1491年在她的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum于1449年出生在英国貝德福爾帕文哈姆时，她的父亲Raufe Radus de Hyde46岁，母亲Margareta Dukinfield45岁。她和Bruce Baker至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1491年在她的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Etheldreia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of the Old English female personal name Æðelþryð ( see Audrey ). It was taken up as a given name in the 19th‐century, but is now very rare.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum was born in 1449, in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Raufe Radus de Hyde, was 46 and her mother, Margareta Dukinfield, was 45. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Bruce Baker. She died in 1491, in her hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum est née en 1449, à Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Raufe Radus de Hyde, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margareta Dukinfield, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Bruce Baker. Elle est décédée en 1491, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum 1449 in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raufe Radus de Hyde 46 und ihre Mutter Margareta Dukinfield 45. Sie hatte mit Bruce Baker mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1491 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum è nata il nel 1449 nel Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Raufe Radus de Hyde, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Margareta Dukinfield, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Bruce Baker. Morì nel 1491, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchumが1449年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアプエイベンハムで生まれた時，父Raufe Radus de Hydeは46歳，母Margareta Dukinfieldは45歳であった。彼女はBruce Bakerとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1491年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum(이)가 1449년 영국 베드퍼드실르 파븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raufe Radus de Hyde(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margareta Dukinfield(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Bruce Baker(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ebrington, Gloucestershire, England, Uni: Ebrington, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum nasceu em 1449, em Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Raufe Radus de Hyde, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margareta Dukinfield, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Bruce Baker. Ela faleceu em 1491, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum родилась в 1449 г. в местности павенам, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Raufe Radus de Hyde было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta Dukinfield, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Bruce Baker. Она умерла в 1491 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Etheldreia Belchum nació en 1449, en Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Raufe Radus de Hyde, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Margareta Dukinfield, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Bruce Baker. Murió en 1491, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
